name: Spectrum Ultra Premium Adult Cat Food Fussy34 2kg
description: Spectrum Fussy 34 , is a specially formulated complete and balanced ultra-premium cat food to meet the nutritional requirements of an adult cat with irregular appetite . CONSISTENT DIGESTION: Helps to increase digestive bacteria with prebiotic ingredients such as fructo-oligosaccarits?to stabilise the intestinal flora, promoting optimal intestinal health. APPETITE REGULATION: SPECTRUM Fussy 34 contains bioactive polypeptides which help stimulate appetite. STRONG IMMUNITY: Supports the?immune system with natural herbal extracts and fructo-oligosaccarits. TASTINESS: The SQF concept In SPECTRUM Fussy 34 is boosted with an exclusive natural aroma to ensure appetite and eating pleasure. SYNOX 3D: a blend of natural, standardised GMO free - titrated plant extracts (Rosemary, grape seed, curcuma, citrus and cloves) clinically proven in cats to counter free radicals induced by oxidative cell damage . Free radicals are essential for life. However, ageing is linked to an increased production of free radicals and a decreased ability to counter their negative effects on health and wellbeing. SYNOX 3D limits the production of malondialdehyde, one of the main toxic metabolites of oxidative stress, protecting cell membrane, mitochondria and genetic material of each individual cell. The unique composition of SYNOX 3D is the result of a screening process on 134 plant extracts, combined with trials in laboratory conditions and a successful clinical trial run in pets. Potential health benefits include increased resistance against oxidative stress, improved life-span and immune stimulation. Qrill: Antarctic qrill is a breakthrough ingredient providing a bioavailable matrix of proteins, omega-3 phospholipids and astaxanthin. Qrill or Euphausia superba phospholipids have been clinically proven to promote brain development, skin health, active joints and body composition. Fructo-oligosaccharides (FOS): stimulate growth and metabolism of beneficial bacteria for the intestine of cats. Ingredients: Dried fish protein, dried chicken protein, brown rice, wheat, corn, chicken oil, corn gluten meal, dried antarctic krill (euphausia superba) (4%), hydrolyzed chicken livers protein, carob flour, brewer's yeast, blueberry, yucca- schidigera, fructo-oligosaccharide (600 ppm), L-carnitine, rosemary (rosmarinus sp.) - turmeric (curcuma sp.) - grape seed (vitis sp.) - citrus (citrus sp.), clove. Additives: Vitamin A (E-672): 18000 IU/kg, Vitamin D3 (E-671): 1500 IU/kg, Vitamin E (3A700): 200 mg/kg, Vitamin C (E301): 200 mg/kg, Taurin: 1500 mg, Iron (E1): 200 mg/kg, Iodine (E2): 1.5 mg/kg, Copper (E4): 18 mg/kg, Manganese (E5): 70 mg/kg, Zinc (E6): 180 mg/kg, Selenium (E8): 0.3 mg/kg, Preservatives - Antioxidants. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein ............................34% Fat ................................... 16% Cellulose (Fiber) .............. 2.5%
